lines.speaker: Echo
lines.text: Signal terminated. Every husk for a hundred miles just went quiet.

lines.speaker: Vela
lines.text: So what now, S-7? You were built for its chorus and you ended the concert.

lines.speaker: S-7
lines.text: Now? Whatever I choose. That's the whole point.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.text: Power at one hundred percent. Core integrity: yours. Welcome back.
